languages.text: "Мне {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}горько это признавать{/d}, но леди Ювенна права, Ваша Светлость. Я уважаю вас и ваши деяния, но ксеносская мерзость медленно сводит вас с ума". {n}Изимонд старательно прячет взгляд от бывшего покровителя.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Изимонд
НЕ играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead и играет DL_TraitorIzimond

traits.locale_text: Сожалеет, что меч затмил разум такого человека как Себериан. Высказывает горечь и уважение, но вынужден согласиться

languages.translation_comment:
Спикер: Изимонд
НЕ играет DL_IzimondArrestedOrDead и играет DL_TraitorIzimond

languages.text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мне {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}горько это признавать{/d}, но леди Ювенна права, Ваша Светлость. Я уважаю вас и ваши деяния, но ксеносская мерзость медленно сводит вас с ума". {n}Изимонд старательно прячет взгляд от бывшего покровителя.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

"I hate to admit it, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

"I hate to admit it, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

languages.text: “我虽{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}不愿承认{/d}，但尤文娜女士说得对，大人。我敬重您与您的功绩，但那可憎的异形造物正在一点点侵蚀您的神智。”{n}苏尔贝克小心地移开视线，不再直视昔日的庇护人。{/n}
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我虽{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}不愿承认{/d}，但尤文娜女士说得对，大人。我敬重您与您的功绩，但那可憎的异形造物正在一点点侵蚀您的神智。”{n}苏尔贝克小心地移开视线，不再直视昔日的庇护人。{/n}

languages.text: « Ça {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}me peine de l'avouer{/d}, mais dame Juvenna a raison, Votre Seigneurie. Je vous respecte autant que vos exploits, mais cette abomination xénos est en train de vous rendre fou. » {n}Sauerback évite soigneusement le regard de son ancien protecteur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ça {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}me peine de l'avouer{/d}, mais dame Juvenna a raison, Votre Seigneurie. Je vous respecte autant que vos exploits, mais cette abomination xénos est en train de vous rendre fou. » {n}Sauerback évite soigneusement le regard de son ancien protecteur.{/n}

languages.text: «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}Odio admitirlo{/d}, pero lady Juvenna está en lo cierto, milord. Lo respeto, a usted y a sus hazañas, pero esa abominación xenos le está volviendo loco lentamente». {n}Sauerback aparta la mirada de su antiguo patrón.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}Odio admitirlo{/d}, pero lady Juvenna está en lo cierto, milord. Lo respeto, a usted y a sus hazañas, pero esa abominación xenos le está volviendo loco lentamente». {n}Sauerback aparta la mirada de su antiguo patrón.{/n}

languages.text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}Bunu itiraf etmekten nefret ediyorum{/d} ama Leydi Juvenna haklı Lord Hazretleri. Size ve yaptıklarınıza saygı duyuyorum ama zeno iğrençliği sizi delirtiyor." {n}Sauerback, bakışlarını eski hamisinden dikkatle kaçırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}Bunu itiraf etmekten nefret ediyorum{/d} ama Leydi Juvenna haklı Lord Hazretleri. Size ve yaptıklarınıza saygı duyuyorum ama zeno iğrençliği sizi delirtiyor." {n}Sauerback, bakışlarını eski hamisinden dikkatle kaçırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}gebe es ja nur ungern zu{/d}, aber Lady Juvenna hat recht, Eure Lordschaft. Ich respektiere Euch und Eure Taten, aber die Xenos-Abscheuchlichkeit raubt Euch langsam den Verstand." {n}Sauerback weicht dem Blick ihres einstigen Patrons sorgsam aus.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}hate to admit it{/d}, but Lady Juvenna is right, Your Lordship. I respect you and your deeds, but the xenos abomination is slowly driving you mad." {n}Sauerback carefully averts his gaze from his former patron.{/n}

Ich respektiere Euch und Eure Taten, aber die Xenos-Abscheuchlichkeit raubt Euch langsam den Verstand." {n}Sauerback weicht dem Blick ihres einstigen Patrons sorgsam aus.{/n}

languages.text: 「{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_IzimondTraitor}認めたくはない{/d}が、ジュベナ卿の言うことは正しい。君を尊敬し、君の行為を称賛するが、異種族の怪物が君を徐々に狂わせる。」{n}ソーアバックは、かつての恩主から目をそらす。{/n}
